titleStmt.title: SII 36.225: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 225. (A.R. No. 225 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a slab lying in the courtyard of the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: The assembly of Kuṟaṭṭūr in Ambattūr-ērikīḻ-nāḍu, a subdivision of Puḻal-kōṭṭam sold a tax free land measuring 1,350 kuḻis, situated on the southern part of the village Kuṟaṭṭūr for lighting a lamp in the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruvalidāyil in Tuḍamuni-nā[ḍu], a subdivision of Puliyūrkkōṭṭam. The temple priests agreed to maintain the perpetual lamp. The document was written by the scribe as per the instructions of the sabhā. Mentions the land measuring rod patiṉaṟu-cāṉ-kōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koppāttiventirātipanmaṟki yāṇṭu Ā
ṟāvatu puḻal koṭṭattu Ampattūrerikīḻ nāṭṭu
k kuṟaṭṭūrākiya śrī purān=takac caturvvetimaṅkalattu
sabhaiyom puliyūrkkoṭṭattut tuṭamuṇi nāṭṭu
tiruvalitāyil mahādevarkku yāṅkaḷ Emmūrt
teṉ kaḻaṉi sabhaimañcikkamāṉa nilam vi
taṟkuk kīḻpāl Ampattūreri nīr koṉ
ṟūrukkup pāynta kāliṉ meṟku teṉpāl
Ampattūreri nīr villipāttukkuṅ koṉṟūr
kkum pānta kāliṉ vaṭakku melpāl sabhaimañcikku mup
sabhaimañcikkamum Iṉnāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭ
ṭa nilam patiṉaṟucāṇ kolāl Āyirattu muṉnūṟṟaim
patu kuḻiyum Itupeṟu vilaikāṇamaṟak koṇṭu tiruvalitāyat
tu mahādevarkku Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom sabhaiyom tiruva
litāyil mahādevarum Innāṉkellaiyuḷḷumakappaṭa bhumi yuṇṇi
lamoḻiviṉṟi yitu peṟu vilaikkāṇamaṟak kuṭuttu viṟṟukkoṇṭa
innilattukku Ērinīrum nīroṭu kālum yāṅkaḷuṭaiyavāṟeyivaṉu
kkumurittākavum Emmilicainta vilaidravyamaṟakkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili
ḻicci Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Itaṟṟirampil thanmā
sana mutalākat tām veṇṭukovukke nicati kaḻañcu ponṟaṇṭa
Oṭṭik kuṭuttom Imaṉṟupāṭiṟuttum Ibhumikku Emmūrā
ḷ koviṉāl vanta vikkamuḷḷatu tīrttuk kuṭuppomāṉom
sabhaiyom sabhai paṇikka kuṟiyuḷḷirunteḻutiṉeṉ Iv
vūrp peruṅkiḻavaṉ niṉṟai nūṟṟeṇma paṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ tiruvallitāyil kūṭṭattāṉ naraciṅka paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ip
paṭiyaṟiveṉ nuḷappiyāṟṟūrk kūṭṭattāṉ tāmotira paṭṭan
ṉṉeṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ koṉṟūrk kūṭṭattāṉ tivākara pa
ṭṭaṉeṉ Ibhumi koṇṭu nilaiviḷakkerippataṟku vaitta po
ṉ ceṅkalaṅ kiḻāṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūraṉ Ibhumi koṇṭu can=tirā
dittavaṟ Oru nantāviḷakkerippomāṉom Uṇṇāḻikai
p perumakkaḷom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 36.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
